{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Green (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] can surround his body in a bubble of Green.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
